title: Earthy Velvety Filipino Scamorza Wrap
description: A unique fusion of earthy flavors and velvety textures, featuring scamorza cheese wrapped in a banana leaf and steamed to perfection. Perfect for the holiday season, this dish is ovo-vegetarian-friendly and sure to impress.
instructions: Wrap a banana leaf around a 1-inch thick layer of scamorza cheese on a flat surface, making sure to cover the cheese entirely.
Fold the leaf over the cheese to form a tight, compact package.
Place the package in a steamer basket and steam for 10 minutes over boiling water.
Meanwhile, mix together coconut milk, saffron threads, and mango chutney in a small bowl.
Remove the cheese package from the steamer and brush the coconut milk mixture evenly over the cheese.
Sprinkle with turmeric, black pepper, and salt to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and fried shallots.
Repeat with remaining ingredients for a festive snack or appetizer.
If desired, serve with additional mango chutney for dipping.
